candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line appears below gross profit and alongside operating expense rows, not within or alongside the selected COGS row. Because it is presented after gross profit, it does not appear to be COGS-related D&A to add to the selected 'Cost of Goods Sold' bucket.
This row is explicitly R&D-related, not COGS-related, and the row is blank in the preview.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown above the financial section. The separate generic 'Depreciation and Amortization' line is below gross profit, so it should not be added to COGS.

candidates.why: This is a separate operating D&A line above EBIT and outside the selected XSGA component rows ('Selling Expenses', 'Research & Development', 'Administrative expenses', 'Other operating expenses'). It appears at the same operating-expense level rather than as a sub-component of those selected rows, so it should be added separately later.

Although it is R&D-related, the row is blank in the preview. Also, 'Research & Development' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding an explicit R&D D&A row separately would risk distortion/double counting under the stated rule.

variables.notes: Selected only the separate summary D&A row. Did not select 'Depreciation/Amortization in R&D' because it is blank and R&D is already handled symmetrically in XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
